chunks.text: Developing a Digital Twin for Indoor Environments: A Case Study (EECS-2021-232) by Yu-wen Lin. Variability-Aware Compact Modeling of Nano-scale Technologies with Customized Test Structure Designs (EECS-2018-148) by Ying Qiao. Efficient Multi-Level Modeling and Monitoring of End-use Energy Profile in Commercial Buildings (EECS-2015-217) by Costas J. Spanos and Zhaoyi Kang.

Social Game for Building Energy Efficiency: Utility Learning, Simulation, Analysis and Incentive Design (EECS-2015-3) by Ioannis Konstantakopoulos, Costas J. Spanos and S. Shankar Sastry. Applied Estimation of Mobile Environments (EECS-2014-32) by Kevin Weekly.

Special Issues in Semiconductor Manufacturing (M95/64) by Costas J. Spanos, J. Chen, R. Chen, C. Fields, H. Huang, A. Ison, X. Niu, D. Park, J. Tao, M. Terrovitis and A. Wang. Special Issues in Semiconductor Manufacturing (M95/63) by Costas J. Spanos, J. Chen, M. Cohn, M. Hatzilambrou, A. Miranda and R. Schenker.

Special Issues in Semiconductor Manufacturing IV (M94/2) by Costas J. Spanos, J. Hutchinson, P. Tsai, H-J. Wann and M. Zuniga. White Paper Concurrent Circuit Design/ Process Engineering in a Flexible Manufacturing Environment (M93/91) by Andrew R. Neureuther, Costas J. Spanos, M. Hatzilambrou and C. Yu.
